name: MarkdownBuilder

unions.name: AppendMode
unions.comment: Represents that `a` is in the _Append Mode_, which enalbes you to append some blocks to it.

unions.name: Builder
unions.comment:
Markdown builder.
You can build a valid markdown structure programmatically in your program:

    myMarkdown : Root
    myMarkdown =
        root
            { title = "Markdown Builder"
            }
            |> editBody
            |> appendParagraph
            |> pushText
                "Markdown Builder builds"
            |> pushEmphasis
                "Markdown"
            |> pushText
                "programmatically."
            |> break
            |> endAppendMode
            |> appendChildSection
                { title = "Builder"
                }
            |> editBody
            |> appendUnorderedList
            |> appendListItem
            |> editListItemContent
            |> pushText "List Item 1"
            |> endPushMode
            |> editListItemChildren
            |> appendOrderedList
            |> appendListItem
            |> editListItemContent
            |> pushText "Child item"
            |> break
            |> break
            |> break
            |> appendListItem
            |> editListItemContent
            |> pushText "List Item 2"
            |> endPushMode
            |> editListItemChildren
            |> appendParagraph
            |> pushText
                "Child paragraph."
            |> break
            |> appendCodeBlock
                """elm
                type Builder parent elem =
                    ...
                    ...
                """
            |> break
            |> appendListItem
            |> editListItemContent
            |> pushText "List Item 3"
            |> run

    toString myMarkdown
        |> String.lines
    --> [ "# Markdown Builder"
    --> , ""
    --> , "Markdown Builder builds *Markdown* programmatically."
    --> , ""
    --> , "## Builder"
    --> , ""
    --> , "* List Item 1"
    --> , "    1. Child item"
    --> , "* List Item 2"
    --> , ""
    --> , "    Child paragraph."
    --> , ""
    --> , "    ```elm"
    --> , "    type Builder parent elem ="
    --> , "        ..."
    --> , "        ..."
    --> , "    ```"
    --> , "* List Item 3"
    --> ]

unions.name: ListItem
unions.comment:
Represents an item in the `ListBlock`.

```markdown
* First `ListItem` content for this unordered `ListBlock`
    Child element for the first `ListItem`.

    1. This `ListItem` is in the child `ListBlock` for the First `ListItem` content.
    1. This `ListItem` is also in the child `ListBlock` for the First `ListItem` content.

* Second `ListItem` content for this unordered `ListBlock`
```

unions.name: PushMode
unions.comment: Represents that `a` is in the _Push Mode_, which enables you to push some inline stuffs to it.

unions.name: Section
unions.comment:
Represents markdown section.

    # Title for Root Section

    Paragraph text in root section body.

    Another paragraph text in root section body.

    * List item in root section body
    * Another list item in root section body

    ## Title for Child Section

    Paragraph text in child section body.

    ```json
    {
      "message": "Code block in child section body."
    }
    ```

    ## Title for Another Child Section

    Paragraph text in another child section body.

    1. Ordered list item in another child section body
    1. Another ordered list item in another child section body

values.name: appendChildSection
values.comment: Append new child section to the current section, and change focus to the new one.
values.type: { title : String.String } -> MarkdownBuilder.Builder p MarkdownBuilder.Section -> MarkdownBuilder.Builder (MarkdownBuilder.Builder p MarkdownBuilder.Section) MarkdownBuilder.Section

values.name: appendCodeBlock
values.comment:
Append a code block, and change focus to it.

Elm code:

    appendCodeBlock
        """elm
        appendCodeBlock
            = Debug.todo ""
        """

Generated markdown:

    ```elm
    appendCodeBlock
        = Debug.todo ""
    ```
values.type: String.String -> MarkdownBuilder.Builder parent (MarkdownBuilder.AppendMode a) -> MarkdownBuilder.Builder parent (MarkdownBuilder.AppendMode a)

values.name: appendListItem
values.type: MarkdownBuilder.Builder p MarkdownBuilder.ListBlock -> MarkdownBuilder.Builder (MarkdownBuilder.Builder p MarkdownBuilder.ListBlock) MarkdownBuilder.ListItem

values.name: appendOrderedList
values.comment: Append an ordered list block, and change focus to it.
values.type: MarkdownBuilder.Builder parent (MarkdownBuilder.AppendMode a) -> MarkdownBuilder.Builder (MarkdownBuilder.Builder parent (MarkdownBuilder.AppendMode a)) MarkdownBuilder.ListBlock

values.name: appendParagraph
values.comment: Append a paragraph block, and change to push mode for the paragraph.
values.type: MarkdownBuilder.Builder parent (MarkdownBuilder.AppendMode a) -> MarkdownBuilder.Builder (MarkdownBuilder.Builder parent (MarkdownBuilder.AppendMode a)) (MarkdownBuilder.PushMode MarkdownBuilder.Paragraph)

values.name: appendUnorderedList
values.comment: Append an unordered list block, and change focus to it.
values.type: MarkdownBuilder.Builder parent (MarkdownBuilder.AppendMode a) -> MarkdownBuilder.Builder (MarkdownBuilder.Builder parent (MarkdownBuilder.AppendMode a)) MarkdownBuilder.ListBlock

values.name: break
values.comment: Quit editing current child, and return to edit its parent.
values.type: MarkdownBuilder.Builder (MarkdownBuilder.Builder parent child) a -> MarkdownBuilder.Builder parent child

values.name: editBody
values.comment: Start [Append Mode](#append-mode) for editing section body.
values.type: MarkdownBuilder.Builder parent MarkdownBuilder.Section -> MarkdownBuilder.Builder parent (MarkdownBuilder.AppendMode MarkdownBuilder.Section)

values.name: editListItemChildren
values.comment: Start [Append Mode](#append-mode) for editing list item children.
values.type: MarkdownBuilder.Builder parent MarkdownBuilder.ListItem -> MarkdownBuilder.Builder parent (MarkdownBuilder.AppendMode MarkdownBuilder.ListItem)

values.name: editListItemContent
values.comment: Start [Push Mode](#push-mode) for editing list item content.
values.type: MarkdownBuilder.Builder parent MarkdownBuilder.ListItem -> MarkdownBuilder.Builder parent (MarkdownBuilder.PushMode MarkdownBuilder.ListItem)

values.name: endAppendMode
values.comment: End append mode.
values.type: MarkdownBuilder.Builder parent (MarkdownBuilder.AppendMode a) -> MarkdownBuilder.Builder parent a

values.name: endPushMode
values.comment: End push mode.
values.type: MarkdownBuilder.Builder p (MarkdownBuilder.PushMode a) -> MarkdownBuilder.Builder p a

values.name: preview
values.comment: Preview markdown content as an HTML page.
values.type: MarkdownBuilder.Root -> Html.Html msg

values.name: pushCode
values.comment:
Push an inline code.

```markdown
`inline code`
```
values.type: String.String -> MarkdownBuilder.Builder parent (MarkdownBuilder.PushMode a) -> MarkdownBuilder.Builder parent (MarkdownBuilder.PushMode a)

values.name: pushEmphasis
values.comment:
Push an emphasized text.

```markdown
*emphasized*
```
values.type: String.String -> MarkdownBuilder.Builder parent (MarkdownBuilder.PushMode a) -> MarkdownBuilder.Builder parent (MarkdownBuilder.PushMode a)

values.name: pushLink
values.comment:
Push a link.

```markdown
[href](text)
```
values.type: { href : String.String, text : String.String } -> MarkdownBuilder.Builder parent (MarkdownBuilder.PushMode a) -> MarkdownBuilder.Builder parent (MarkdownBuilder.PushMode a)

values.name: pushStrikethrough
values.comment:
Push a strikethrough text.

```markdown
~~strikethrough~~
```
values.type: String.String -> MarkdownBuilder.Builder parent (MarkdownBuilder.PushMode a) -> MarkdownBuilder.Builder parent (MarkdownBuilder.PushMode a)

values.name: pushStrongEmphasis
values.comment:
Push a strongly emphasized text.

```markdown
**emphasized**
```
values.type: String.String -> MarkdownBuilder.Builder parent (MarkdownBuilder.PushMode a) -> MarkdownBuilder.Builder parent (MarkdownBuilder.PushMode a)

values.name: pushText
values.comment: Push a plain text.
values.type: String.String -> MarkdownBuilder.Builder parent (MarkdownBuilder.PushMode a) -> MarkdownBuilder.Builder parent (MarkdownBuilder.PushMode a)

values.name: root
values.comment: Entry point for building markdown.
values.type: { title : String.String } -> MarkdownBuilder.Builder MarkdownBuilder.Root MarkdownBuilder.Section

values.name: run
values.comment: Quit modifying markdown, and compile it to the valid markdown structure.
values.type: MarkdownBuilder.Builder parent a -> MarkdownBuilder.Root

values.name: toString
values.comment: Render `Root` into markdown text string.
values.type: MarkdownBuilder.Root -> String.String
